violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the ice cream service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knife) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Firm is not in conformance with the following items of their HACCP plan: 1) labels (use by date and keep refrigerated) 2) records (juice temperature, juice cooler temperature) Please email inspector proof of corrections. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Self-serve candy is missing allergen disclosure. Per person in charge, allergen disclosure signs/stickers will be placed on candy. Please email inspector proof of correction. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Bread and fudge packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food was removed from the shelf and must not be used until labels with all the required information are placed on food. Please inspector proof of corrections. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Establishment installed a bucket to the ice machine for the ice scoop at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Potatoes, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Potatoes were observed held warm in a plastic container, greater that four inches, with a tight fitting lid. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Lemondae packaged in the food establishment are lacking proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The following in use utensils were observed not properly stored: 1) The ice scoop was observed stored on unclean surface (top of ice machine) 2) An ice scoop in the front service area was observed stored with handle in direct contact with ice Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the pot washing machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The establishment is bottling juice without a variance. Per PIC juice was recently bottled. Juice was emptied into another container. Establishment is to no long bottle their orange juice without approval. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
The display case in the front of the establishment was observed with an ambient temperature of 42-43 degrees. Establishment to get unit serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
